projects.title: AAE Platform
projects.description: The full agent economy stack. Six modular layers — ERC-8004 identity, OWASP safety, Echo Brain memory, x402 commerce, credit scoring, voice personas. Chain-agnostic core with chain-specific adapters.

projects.title: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Cross-chain payment infrastructure with AI agent integration. Agents escrow, validate, and release payments automatically. Live on Avalanche & Base with 6+ production positions.

projects.title: Agent Credit Score
projects.description: 0-850 credit scoring system for AI agents. Tracks win rate, risk-adjusted returns, consistency, and behavior across DeFi protocols. 22/22 tests passing. MIT licensed.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Voice Integration
projects.description: Four-agent voice system (Gentech, YoYo, DMOB, Desmond) with daily automated briefings. End-to-end TTS pipeline with dialogue generation, voice selection, and audio mixing.

projects.title: DeFi Milestones
projects.description: Automated LP tracking and rebalancing on Avalanche. Live DexScreener data, fee efficiency scoring, milestone-based adjustments. Managing real positions with real money.

projects.title: Cookbook Nanopay
projects.description: Pay-per-recipe platform using Circle Gateway nanopayments. $0.005/recipe, $0.001/review. Gas-free x402 payments settling in <500ms. Built for Lepton Agents Hackathon.
